name: tooltip
description: A small floating label that reveals on hover or focus. Wrap your app in TooltipProvider, then use Tooltip/TooltipTrigger/TooltipContent per tooltip.

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: [TooltipProvider prop] Milliseconds before the tooltip appears on hover

props.name: disableHoverableContent
props.description: [TooltipProvider prop] When true, tooltip dismisses when cursor enters it

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: [Tooltip root prop] Default open state for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: [Tooltip root prop] Callback on open state change: (open: boolean) => void

slots.name: children
slots.description: TooltipTrigger + TooltipContent, all inside a TooltipProvider

ai.whenToUse: Use for terse hover/focus-reveal info: icon button labels, abbreviation expansions, keyboard shortcut hints. Content should fit in one line.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for rich content with images or actions (use HoverCard or Popover). Don't use for the only way to convey essential info — it's invisible to touch users.
commonMistakes: Forgetting TooltipProvider at the app root
Tooltip content too long (keep it under one line)
Using Tooltip as the only label for icon buttons (still add aria-label)
ai.accessibilityNotes: Triggers on focus and hover. Radix sets role='tooltip' and aria-describedby. Still pair icon buttons with aria-label since tooltips don't announce on touch.
